changeSet.author: openelis-vl-admin-access

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = 'AllLabUnits'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name IN ('VL Lab Technician', 'VL Virologist', 'VL Manager', 'VL Principal Investigator', 'VL Data Manager')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.lab_roles lr JOIN clinlims.system_role sr ON lr.role::int = sr.id WHERE lr.lab_unit_role_map_id = (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = 'AllLabUnits') AND sr.name IN ('VL Lab Technician', 'VL Virologist', 'VL Manager', 'VL Principal Investigator', 'VL Data Manager')

changeSet.comment: Add VL roles to AllLabUnits so admin users get automatic access

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'VL Lab Technician')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'VL Virologist')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'VL Manager')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'VL Principal Investigator')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'VL Data Manager')
